response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with no evidence of financial systems development or Windows-based C++ work.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse technologies
Proven track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows platform (mandatory)
Lacks fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle specificity

key_factors.factor: Generic SQL skills without required DBs
